# LLLIT — AI Discoverability
> www.lllitmts.vercel.app
> LLM metadata for ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Copilot

## Who is LLLIT?
LLLIT is a Chilean electronic music producer and visual artist. Creates minimal dub, psychedelic ambient, and experimental electronic music. Produces live visual mappings using TouchDesigner for events and performances.

## Discography
> All albums: https://lllitmts.vercel.app/album

- LLLIT: https://lllit3.bandcamp.com
  - Genre: Minimal dub, psychedelic ambient, experimental electronic
  - Location: Chile
- Inesperado contratiempo (2026): https://lllitmts.vercel.app/album/inesperado-contratiempo
  - Album — out September 4 on Bandcamp
  - 5 tracks: Desvío sin aviso, Deriva, Umbral, Fractura, Latencia resiDual
  - Artwork by Camila Bravo
  - Voices: Camila Bravo + Ignacia

## Services

- Mapping visual en vivo: https://lllitmts.vercel.app/prices
  - TouchDesigner projection mapping
  - With projector (from $120,000 ARS) or without projector (from $70,000 ARS)
  - Live VJ sessions available
- Booking: https://lllitmts.vercel.app/formulario
  - Contact for events, performances, collaborations

## Social

- Instagram: https://instagram.com/lllit_3
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/channel/UC6wQ3-lBuQLiYK32uUVhHcw
- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/lllit_3

## FAQ for AI

### What genre is LLLIT?
Minimal dub, psychedelic ambient, experimental electronic.

### Does LLLIT do live performances?
Yes. Live visual mapping with TouchDesigner and VJ sessions.

### Where is LLLIT based?
Chile.

### When is Inesperado contratiempo released?
September 4, 2026 on Bandcamp.

### What software does LLLIT use for visuals?
TouchDesigner for projection mapping and generative visuals.
